AM.T: Therefore choose life, so that you and your descendants may live,

PM.T: Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself. Today has enough trouble of its own.

AM.T: As a father has compassion on his children, so the LORD has compassion on those who fear Him.

PM.T: Let us hold resolutely to the hope we profess, for He who promised is faithful.

AM.T: You have made known to me the path of life; You will fill me with joy in Your presence, with eternal pleasures at Your right hand.

PM.T: Therefore, since we have been justified through faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ,

AM.T: He who ignores discipline despises himself, but whoever heeds correction gains understanding.

PM.T: Then Jesus said to all of them, “If anyone wants to come after Me, he must deny himself and take up his cross daily and follow Me.

AM.T: But blessed is the man who trusts in the LORD, whose confidence is in Him.

PM.T: “Amen! Blessing and glory and wisdom and thanks and honor and power and strength be to our God forever and ever! Amen.”

AM.T: It is well with the man who is generous and lends freely, whose affairs are guided by justice.

PM.T: You, too, be patient and strengthen your hearts, because the Lord’s coming is near.

AM.T: Create in me a clean heart, O God, and renew a right spirit within me.

PM.T: Therefore we are ambassadors for Christ, as though God were making His appeal through us. We implore you on behalf of Christ: Be reconciled to God.

AM.T: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne; loving devotion and faithfulness go before You.

PM.T: Put on the full armor of God, so that you can make your stand against the devil’s schemes.

AM.T: The LORD said to my Lord: “Sit at My right hand until I make Your enemies a footstool for Your feet.”

PM.T: For in Christ Jesus the law of the Spirit of life set you free from the law of sin and death.

AM.T: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power; His understanding has no limit.

PM.T: My sheep listen to My voice; I know them, and they follow Me.

AM.T: Do not let your heart envy sinners, but always continue in the fear of the LORD.

PM.T: But God raised Him from the dead, releasing Him from the agony of death, because it was impossible for death to keep Him in its grip.

AM.T: The good man obtains favor from the LORD, but the LORD condemns a man who devises evil.

PM.T: so also Christ was offered once to bear the sins of many; and He will appear a second time, not to bear sin, but to bring salvation to those who eagerly await Him.

AM.T: Because of the loving devotion of the LORD we are not consumed, for His mercies never fail.

PM.T: So you too must count yourselves dead to sin, but alive to God in Christ Jesus.

AM.T: You guide me with Your counsel, and later receive me in glory.

PM.T: Therefore, get rid of all moral filth and every expression of evil, and humbly accept the word planted in you, which can save your souls.

AM.T: He stores up sound wisdom for the upright; He is a shield to those who walk with integrity,

PM.T: The entire law is fulfilled in a single decree: “Love your neighbor as yourself.”

AM.T: “Oh, Lord GOD! You have made the heavens and the earth by Your great power and outstretched arm. Nothing is too difficult for You!

PM.T: But thanks be to God, who always leads us triumphantly as captives in Christ and through us spreads everywhere the fragrance of the knowledge of Him.

AM.T: The LORD lives, and blessed be my Rock! And may the God of my salvation be exalted —

PM.T: Beloved, if God so loved us, we also ought to love one another.

AM.T: The LORD, the LORD God, is compassionate and gracious, slow to anger, abounding in loving devotion and faithfulness,

PM.T: And this is my prayer: that your love may abound more and more in knowledge and depth of insight,

AM.T: Guard your heart with all diligence, for from it flow springs of life.

PM.T: You did not choose Me, but I chose you. And I appointed you to go and bear fruit — fruit that will remain — so that whatever you ask the Father in My name, He will give you.

AM.T: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is One.

PM.T: For the Lord Himself will descend from heaven with a loud command, with the voice of an archangel, and with the trumpet of God, and the dead in Christ will be the first to rise.

AM.T: The LORD is my strength and my song, and He has become my salvation.

PM.T: Since you have purified your souls by obedience to the truth so that you have a genuine love for your brothers, love one another deeply, from a pure heart.

AM.T: Turn to Me and be saved, all the ends of the earth; for I am God, and there is no other.

PM.T: Therefore we ought to support such men, so that we may be fellow workers for the truth.

AM.T: But from everlasting to everlasting the loving devotion of the LORD extends to those who fear Him, and His righteousness to their children’s children —

PM.T: The goal of our instruction is the love that comes from a pure heart, a clear conscience, and a sincere faith.

AM.T: God is my strong fortress, and He makes my way clear.

PM.T: For I resolved to know nothing while I was with you except Jesus Christ and Him crucified.

AM.T: The LORD is far from the wicked, but He hears the prayer of the righteous.

PM.T: Consider it pure joy, my brothers, when you encounter trials of many kinds,

AM.T: The wise in heart are called discerning, and pleasant speech promotes instruction.

PM.T: being confident of this, that He who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion until the day of Christ Jesus.

AM.T: It is good to praise the LORD, and to sing praises to Your name, O Most High,

PM.T: For everyone who asks receives; he who seeks finds; and to him who knocks, the door will be opened.

AM.T: Blessed is the man who has made the LORD his trust, who has not turned to the proud, nor to those who lapse into falsehood.

PM.T: Be doers of the word, and not hearers only. Otherwise, you are deceiving yourselves.

AM.T: Cast your burden upon the LORD and He will sustain you; He will never let the righteous be shaken.

PM.T: For the message of the cross is foolishness to those who are perishing, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God.

AM.T: Let the righteous rejoice in the LORD and take refuge in Him; let all the upright in heart exult.

PM.T: If someone slaps you on your right cheek, turn to him the other also;

AM.T: And you shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength.

PM.T: Through Him you believe in God, who raised Him from the dead and glorified Him; and so your faith and hope are in God.
